_comment: Recorded-fixture mirroring the shape of an Anthropic Messages response with native citations enabled. Mirrors anthropic SDK 0.96.0 types: TextBlock with citations, CitationContentBlockLocation. Used by tests/unit/providers/test_claude_citations.py to lock the parser against the real shape.

content.text: The security audit pipeline runs ruff and bandit in sequence

citations.cited_text: ruff and bandit run in sequence as the security audit pipeline.
any HIGH-severity finding is a failure.
